instructions.title: HOW TO PLAY
instructions.whatIsBody: is a biblical Trivia app to learn, review and strengthen your knowledge of the Word while playing. Its agile format turns bible study into an entertaining and motivating experience, ideal for youth, families and church groups. Play in teams or solo, earn points and live a fun challenge with purpose while learning and growing together.
instructions.howToPlayBody:
The game is played in turns between two teams. On your turn, you choose a question within a category and have 30 seconds to answer. You can play 1 vs 1 or 4 vs 4.
Each correct answer earns points, and a streak of 3 correct answers gives you bonus points.
The team with the most points wins.

controller.title: REMOTE CONTROL
controller.instructionsActive: Press if you know the answer!
controller.instructionsIdle: Wait for the host to read the question.

alerts.autoCreateErrorMessage: Could not create session to save game.
alerts.permissionsWarningMessage: Could not save game to history (Permissions).

about.title: ABOUT US
about.body:
At TRIBIBLIA®, we believe that learning the Bible doesn't have to feel complicated or distant. That's why we created an agile and entertaining experience that helps you review, memorize, and strengthen your knowledge of the Word while you play. Here, every question is an opportunity to discover, remember, and connect with Scripture in a dynamic and motivating way.

TRIBIBLIA® works with a simple format: you choose a category, answer within a time limit, and score points. You can play solo or in teams, making it ideal for youth, families, friends, and church groups. Healthy competition, streaks, and bonus points turn every game into an exciting challenge with a purpose: to learn more and share that learning with others.

Our mission is for Bible study to become part of everyday life, without pressure and with enthusiasm. We want TRIBIBLIA® to be a useful tool for meetings, youth nights, family gatherings, or any moment where you want to test what you know and keep growing. We continue working to add new categories, more questions, game improvements, and an increasingly complete experience.

If you want to send us suggestions, report a detail, or simply get in touch with us, write to us at info@tribiblia.com. We'd love to read from you and continue building this community with you.

And since TRIBIBLIA® is a free application, your support can make a huge difference. If this project blesses you and adds value to you, we invite you to collaborate with us so we can continue developing it, adding content, and taking the app to more people. You can do this simply via the Buy Me a Coffee button: every contribution, no matter how small, helps us keep growing and improving TRIBIBLIA® for the entire community. 🙌📖

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.body1:
Last updated: January 2026

**1) Data Controller**
DMediaGroup SRL (“TRIBIBLIA®”, “we”), based in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, is the data controller for personal data collected through tribiblia.com (the “Platform”).
Privacy Contact: info@tribiblia.com

**2) What Data We Collect**
**A. Data you provide**
Email (registration and account recovery).
Username.
Avatar (in text/emoji format selected by the user).

**B. Data collected automatically**
IP address and connection data (security and operation).
Game statistics (e.g., scores, progress, match history).
Technical device/browser data (diagnostics, stability, abuse prevention).
Cookies/identifiers (see Cookies Policy).

**3) Why We Use Your Data**
We use your data to:
Create and manage your account, allow access, and save your progress.
Operate the game and its features (categories, scores, history).
Maintain security, prevent fraud/abuse, and debug errors.
Measure Platform usage and improve the experience (analytics).
privacy.body2:
**4) Legal Basis (where GDPR/Europe applies)**
When applicable (e.g., if you access from the EEA/UK), we process data under:
Performance of a contract/service (account and game functionality).
Legitimate interest (security, abuse prevention, technical improvements).
Consent (especially for non-essential cookies where required by law).
Important note: we currently do not display a cookie banner. You can manage cookies from your browser. If you are in jurisdictions requiring prior consent for analytics, we recommend disabling cookies/tracking from your browser or using opt-out tools (see Cookies).

**5) Third Parties and Providers**
We share only what is necessary with providers to operate the Platform:
Supabase: Database and authentication (DB/Auth). Supabase has a Data Processing Addendum (DPA) and provides for international transfer mechanisms like SCCs.
Hostinger: hosting/infrastructure where the PWA is hosted. Hostinger publishes data center locations and a DPA.
Google Analytics (GA): web usage measurement via cookies/identifiers and browser data. Google offers privacy controls and opt-out options (see Cookies).
Buy Me a Coffee: processes voluntary contributions. We do not store card data; payment is handled by the third party according to their policies.

**6) International Transfers**
By using global providers (e.g., Supabase, Google, or Hostinger), data may be processed outside your country. Where applicable, such providers provide for contractual mechanisms for international transfers (e.g., SCCs).

**7) Data Retention**
We retain your data:
While your account is active, and/or until you request deletion.
Some technical logs (security/errors) may be retained for a limited additional period for security and compliance reasons.
privacy.body3:
**8) Your Rights**
You may request access, rectification, deletion, or other applicable actions according to your jurisdiction by writing to info@tribiblia.com.
If you are in the EEA/UK, you may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

**9) Minors**
TRIBIBLIA® is directed to the general public. We recommend adult supervision when minors use the Platform. We do not knowingly seek to collect data from children in a manner contrary to applicable regulations (e.g., COPPA in the US).

**10) Security**
We implement reasonable measures to protect information (access controls, security best practices, and use of providers with technical/organizational measures). Supabase describes its security and contractual approach via its documentation/DPA.

**11) Changes to this Policy**
We may update this Policy. We will post the new “Last updated” date and, if the change is material, make reasonable efforts to notify you on the Platform.

terms.title: TERMS OF USE
terms.body1:
Last updated: January 2026

**1) Acceptance**
By accessing or using TRIBIBLIA® (the “Platform”), you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

**2) What is TRIBIBLIA®**
TRIBIBLIA® is a web app (PWA) accessible from mobile and desktop browsers. It is currently not distributed as a native app on the App Store/Play Store.

**3) Permitted Use**
You may use TRIBIBLIA® for personal, educational, and recreational purposes. You agree not to:
Violate security, attempt unauthorized access, or interfere with operation.
Automate use abusively (bots, scraping questions, attacks, spam).
Use the Platform for illegal purposes or those that infringe on third-party rights.

**4) Accounts**
You are responsible for the confidentiality of your account and the use made of it. We may suspend or limit accounts if we detect abuse, fraud, or violation of these Terms.
terms.body2:
**5) Intellectual Property**
The Platform (brand, design, software, questions/structure, and proprietary content) belongs to TRIBIBLIA® or its licensors. You are granted a limited and revocable license to use it in accordance with these Terms.

**6) Free Service and Contributions**
TRIBIBLIA® is a free platform. If you wish to support the project, you can contribute via Buy Me a Coffee. Contributions are voluntary and processing is handled by a third party; TRIBIBLIA® does not manage card data nor guarantee benefits or consideration for the contribution.

**7) Availability**
We may modify, suspend, or discontinue the Platform content or services, in whole or in part, as well as add or remove features, without obligation to maintain uninterrupted availability.

**8) Disclaimer of Warranties**
The Platform is offered “as is” and “as available,” without warranties of total absence of errors or continuous availability.
terms.body3:
**9) Limitation of Liability**
To the maximum extent permitted by law, TRIBIBLIA® shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Platform.

**10) Minors**
The Platform is directed to the general public. For minors, adult supervision is recommended.

**11) Applicable Law and Jurisdiction**
These Terms are governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, except for mandatory rules applicable by the user's residence.

**12) Contact**
Support and inquiries: info@tribiblia.com

cookies.title: COOKIES POLICY
cookies.body1:
Last updated: January 2026

**1) What are cookies**
Cookies are small files stored on your device to enable functions, remember preferences, and measure site usage.

**2) What cookies we use**
TRIBIBLIA® may use:
Strictly necessary cookies: enable basic functions (security, session, stability).
Preference cookies: save basic choices (e.g., language if applicable).
Analytics cookies: to understand Platform usage and improve it (e.g., Google Analytics).
cookies.body2:
**3) Consent and control**
We currently do not display a cookies banner. You can manage cookies directly from your browser (block, delete, or restrict). Note that blocking necessary cookies may affect functionality.
If you wish to specifically opt-out of Google Analytics, Google offers an official opt-out add-on for compatible browsers.

**4) Third-party cookies**
Some integrated services (like Google Analytics) may set their own cookies/identifiers to function.
cookies.body3:
**5) Changes**
We may update this Cookies Policy to reflect technical or legal changes, indicating the new update date.
